info.name: ReviewFlow — Complete Test Suite with Caching
info.description:
Comprehensive test collection covering all ReviewFlow endpoints including new caching features.

Run in order for proper test flow. Each service section is independent once authenticated.

Base URL: http://localhost:8081/api/v1

Test Credentials:
- Admin: admin@reviewflow.com / Admin@1234
- Instructor: sarah.johnson@university.edu / Test@1234
- Student: jane.smith@university.edu / Test@1234
- Student2: marcus.chen@university.edu / Test@1234
